prompt: I have a CSV export from an exchange that isn't natively supported by Clams. The file is at ~/Downloads/exchange-trades.csv and has these columns: Date, Type, Asset, Amount, Price, Fee, Fee Asset, Total. The Type column has values like Buy, Sell, Deposit, Withdrawal. Help me import this into Clams so I can track my cost basis.

assertions.text: Builds a csv_mapping JSON configuration with dialect and row_patterns
Maps Buy rows to canonical type trade (or deposit) with correct field expressions
Maps Sell rows to canonical type trade (or withdrawal) with correct field expressions
Maps Deposit rows to canonical type deposit
Maps Withdrawal rows to canonical type withdrawal
Runs clams connections import with --input-format csv and the user's CSV file
Runs clams journals process after importing
